target_notes: M-dwarf, ~100 ly distant, hosts the first Earth-sized habitable-zone planet found by TESS (TOI-700 d, announced 2026-01-06). Stellar params: TEFF~3494 K, R~0.42 R_sun, V_TESS~10.91. Sky position RA~97.10 deg, Dec~-65.58 deg.
capture_method: MAST sector-bulk manifest (https://archive.stsci.edu/missions/tess/download_scripts/sector/tesscurl_sector_1_lc.sh) grepped for TIC-padded URL, downloaded via httpx with follow_redirects=True (302s through stpubdata.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com), then parsed with astropy.io.fits.
